name: Emily UI component manifest
description: Exhaustive map of the Emily UI system across all layers. Source of truth for what exists, what is planned, and what is blocked. Implementation is phased: tokens/ions -> manifest -> atoms -> molecules -> organisms -> templates -> pages/starters -> catalogue.

components.name: Colour scales
components.accessibilityNotes: OKLCH 10-shade scales per configured colour; shade 80 = source hex.

components.name: Semantic role tokens
components.accessibilityNotes: background, surface, surface-raised, text, text-muted, border, brand, accent, cta, success, warning, error, focus. Components consume roles, not palette steps.

components.name: Focus ring tokens
components.accessibilityNotes: Width, colour, offset, glow — consumed by every interactive atom.

components.name: Primary button
components.accessibilityNotes: Use <button> for actions, <a> for navigation. Min 3rem hit height. Visible focus ring from focus tokens.

components.name: Secondary button
components.accessibilityNotes: Outlined on surface; contrast maintained on hover.

components.name: Tertiary button
components.accessibilityNotes: Decide whether ghost covers the third rank or a distinct treatment is needed.

components.name: Link-style button
components.accessibilityNotes: Underlined so it is not colour-only. Still a real <button> when it performs an action.

components.name: Icon-only button
components.accessibilityNotes: Requires .sr-only text label or aria-label. Square hit area via .btn-icon.

components.name: Button with icon
components.accessibilityNotes: Icon marked aria-hidden="true"; label carried by text.

components.name: Full-width button
components.accessibilityNotes: w-full utility; use for mobile CTAs.

components.name: Destructive/danger button
components.accessibilityNotes: Not colour-only: label must state the destructive action.

components.name: Loading button
components.accessibilityNotes: disabled + aria-busy while submitting; label changes to progress text. State toggle is consumer JS.

components.name: Disabled button
components.accessibilityNotes: disabled attribute; do not fake with classes alone.

components.name: External-link button
components.accessibilityNotes: rel="noopener"; visually or textually indicate it leaves the site.

components.name: Download button
components.accessibilityNotes: download attribute; state file type/size in the label where possible.

components.name: Call button
components.accessibilityNotes: tel: href; full number in accessible label.

components.name: Email button
components.accessibilityNotes: mailto: href.

components.name: Message/WhatsApp button
components.accessibilityNotes: sms:/messaging href; generic example, no vendor branding baked in.

components.name: Button group
components.accessibilityNotes: role="group" with aria-label when the set is one control cluster.

components.name: Text input
components.accessibilityNotes: Always pair with a visible <label>. aria-invalid drives error styling.

components.name: Email input
components.accessibilityNotes: type="email" + autocomplete="email".

components.name: Phone input
components.accessibilityNotes: type="tel" + autocomplete="tel".

components.name: Password input
components.accessibilityNotes: autocomplete="current-password"/"new-password". Show/hide toggle is a molecule needing JS.

components.name: Textarea
components.accessibilityNotes: Vertical resize only; min-height set.

components.name: Search input
components.accessibilityNotes: type="search" inside role="search" landmark where appropriate.

components.name: Currency input
components.accessibilityNotes: inputmode="decimal"; currency symbol outside the field, not placeholder-only.

components.name: Postcode input
components.accessibilityNotes: autocomplete="postal-code"; no country-specific pattern hard-coded.

components.name: Address lookup input
components.accessibilityNotes: Requires lookup service + combobox pattern (aria-expanded, listbox). Plain address fields work today.

components.name: Date picker
components.accessibilityNotes: Native input[type="date"]. Custom calendar widget deferred — heavy JS + a11y cost.

components.name: Time picker
components.accessibilityNotes: Native input[type="time"].

components.name: Date/time picker
components.accessibilityNotes: Native input[type="datetime-local"].

components.name: Select
components.accessibilityNotes: Native select with custom chevron; keyboard behaviour stays native.

components.name: Multi-select
components.accessibilityNotes: Native select[multiple] with size attribute. Tag-style enhanced multi-select is needs-js later.

components.name: Checkbox
components.accessibilityNotes: 1.5rem hit area; label clickable via checkbox-group pairing.

components.name: Radio
components.accessibilityNotes: Custom-drawn but keyboard/AT behaviour is native input.

components.name: Toggle/switch
components.accessibilityNotes: No .switch class yet. Needs styled track/thumb on a real checkbox with role="switch" review before shipping.

components.name: File upload
components.accessibilityNotes: Native input[type="file"] works unstyled; no token-first file trigger styling yet.

components.name: Image upload
components.accessibilityNotes: Same as file upload plus accept="image/*". Preview version is a molecule.

components.name: Drag-and-drop upload
components.accessibilityNotes: Drop zone requires JS and a keyboard-equivalent fallback input.

components.name: Range slider
components.accessibilityNotes: Native input[type="range"] functional; brand styling of track/thumb not yet generated.

components.name: Colour picker
components.accessibilityNotes: Native input[type="color"]; label carries meaning.

components.name: Quantity stepper
components.accessibilityNotes: Increment/decrement buttons need JS wiring to the number input.

components.name: Hidden honeypot field
components.accessibilityNotes: Visually hidden, aria-hidden, tabindex="-1", autocomplete="off" — must never trap AT or keyboard users.

components.name: H1
components.accessibilityNotes: One per page; sized via utilities or .hero-title in hero contexts.

components.name: Lead paragraph
components.accessibilityNotes: Larger muted intro text; keep line length readable.

components.name: Fine print
components.accessibilityNotes: text-xs; never below 12px equivalent.

components.name: Section kicker
components.accessibilityNotes: Same .eyebrow class in section context.

components.name: Blockquote
components.accessibilityNotes: Styled inside .prose; cite outside the quote element.

components.name: Pull quote
components.accessibilityNotes: Utility composition; decorative marks aria-hidden.

components.name: Code block
components.accessibilityNotes: .code-window with token classes; scrollable region needs tabindex="0".

components.name: Link
components.accessibilityNotes: Underlined in prose — not colour-only.

components.name: Muted text
components.accessibilityNotes: text-muted role token; keep AA contrast.

components.name: Responsive image
components.accessibilityNotes: max-w-full h-auto; meaningful alt or alt="".

components.name: Fixed-ratio image
components.accessibilityNotes: aspect-* + object-cover prevents layout shift.

components.name: Avatar
components.accessibilityNotes: alt names the person, or alt="" if the name is adjacent.

components.name: Logo
components.accessibilityNotes: Height-constrained img; alt = organisation name.

components.name: Icon
components.accessibilityNotes: Decorative icons aria-hidden="true" focusable="false".

components.name: SVG icon wrapper
components.accessibilityNotes: fill-current inherits text colour; sized via w-/h- utilities.

components.name: Video embed
components.accessibilityNotes: aspect-video wrapper; iframe requires title attribute.

components.name: Audio player
components.accessibilityNotes: Native <audio controls>; provide transcript nearby.

components.name: Figure with caption
components.accessibilityNotes: figcaption supplements alt text, does not repeat it.

components.name: Gallery thumbnail
components.accessibilityNotes: aspect-square object-cover; link needs accessible name.

components.name: Before image
components.accessibilityNotes: Plain labelled image; interactive slider is a needs-js organism.

components.name: Open Graph image template
components.accessibilityNotes: Tooling/asset concern, not an HTML/CSS atom. Revisit with SEO helpers.

components.name: Badge
components.accessibilityNotes: Text carries meaning, not just colour.

components.name: Chip
components.accessibilityNotes: Dismiss control is a real button with accessible name; removal behaviour needs consumer JS.

components.name: Status dot
components.accessibilityNotes: Decorative — always accompany with visible or .sr-only status text.

components.name: Tooltip trigger/base
components.accessibilityNotes: Hover/focus/escape handling + aria-describedby wiring required.

components.name: Spinner
components.accessibilityNotes: Wrap in role="status" with .sr-only "Loading…" text. Slows under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Progress bar
components.accessibilityNotes: Native <progress> with visible label; value announced by AT.

components.name: Skeleton loader
components.accessibilityNotes: aria-hidden="true"; announce loading via a single live region instead. Static under reduced motion.

components.name: Inline error text
components.accessibilityNotes: Link to input via aria-describedby; pairs with aria-invalid.

components.name: Toast base
components.accessibilityNotes: Live region politeness, timing, dismissal and focus rules need JS + review.

components.name: Container
components.accessibilityNotes: .width-container — max-width + responsive padding.

components.name: Split layout
components.accessibilityNotes: Collapses to one column under 768px.

components.name: Divider
components.accessibilityNotes: Styled <hr>; purely visual separators can use role="presentation".

components.name: Spacer
components.accessibilityNotes: Use margin/padding/gap utilities — no dedicated spacer element.

components.name: Scroll area
components.accessibilityNotes: tabindex="0" + aria-label so keyboard users can scroll it.

components.name: Visually-hidden text
components.accessibilityNotes: .sr-only / .sr-only-focusable.

components.name: Skip link
components.accessibilityNotes: First focusable element; reveals on focus.

components.name: Focus ring style
components.accessibilityNotes: Token-driven; never remove without replacement.

components.name: Form field (label, hint, input, error)
components.accessibilityNotes: Hint and error linked via aria-describedby; error styling driven by aria-invalid.

components.name: Required field marker
components.accessibilityNotes: Mark optional fields instead where most fields are required.

components.name: Fieldset with legend
components.accessibilityNotes: Legend styled via formBase config; groups related controls.

components.name: Radio group
components.accessibilityNotes: Wrap in fieldset + legend naming the question.

components.name: Toggle row
components.accessibilityNotes: Blocked on the switch atom.

components.name: Consent checkbox
components.accessibilityNotes: Never pre-ticked; link to policy text.

components.name: Validation summary
components.accessibilityNotes: .error-summary — focus it on failed submit; links target the offending fields.

components.name: Multi-step progress indicator
components.accessibilityNotes: Step state must be announced (aria-current="step") — review before build.

components.name: Service card
components.accessibilityNotes: Whole-card click via stretched link; one real link per card.

components.name: Testimonial card
components.accessibilityNotes: Quote + attribution structure; avoid blockquote misuse for layout.

components.name: FAQ item
components.accessibilityNotes: Native details/summary first; JS accordion only if needed.

components.name: Accordion item
components.accessibilityNotes: details/summary vs button+region decision affects AT behaviour.

components.name: Tab item
components.accessibilityNotes: Roving tabindex + aria-selected required.

components.name: Alert/notification banner
components.accessibilityNotes: Molecule, not atom: status + icon + text + optional action. role="alert" only for interruptions.

components.name: Cookie notice banner
components.accessibilityNotes: Consent state, focus handling, and persistence need JS.

components.name: Breadcrumb trail
components.accessibilityNotes: nav aria-label="Breadcrumb"; current page aria-current="page".

components.name: Pagination
components.accessibilityNotes: nav landmark; current page marked, not colour-only.

components.name: Rating/review stars
components.accessibilityNotes: Display-only rating needs text equivalent; input rating is harder — review first.

components.name: Simple header
components.accessibilityNotes: Skip link first; nav landmark labelled.

components.name: Header with services dropdown
components.accessibilityNotes: Disclosure pattern: button + aria-expanded, escape to close.

components.name: Header with mega menu
components.accessibilityNotes: Keyboard traversal and escape behaviour need careful review.

components.name: Sticky header
components.accessibilityNotes: Ensure focus targets are not hidden beneath it (scroll-margin).

components.name: Transparent-over-hero header
components.accessibilityNotes: Contrast over imagery cannot be guaranteed — review per use.

components.name: Mobile drawer menu
components.accessibilityNotes: Focus trap, escape, inert background.

components.name: Footer with contact details and opening hours
Full-bleed image hero
components.accessibilityNotes: Text-over-image contrast needs per-use verification.

components.name: Floating call button
components.accessibilityNotes: Must not obscure content or trap zoomed layouts.

components.name: Booking/availability widget
components.accessibilityNotes: Depends on external booking data — out of scope for the CSS/HTML system for now.

components.name: Quote estimate/result panel
components.accessibilityNotes: Depends on calculator logic.

components.name: Testimonials carousel
components.accessibilityNotes: Prefer grid; carousels need pause/controls/reduced-motion handling.

components.name: Google reviews embed pattern
components.accessibilityNotes: Third-party embed; document integration rather than own it.

components.name: Comparison table
components.accessibilityNotes: Header scope, caption, and mobile scroll pattern need review.

components.name: Lightbox gallery
components.accessibilityNotes: Dialog semantics, focus trap, escape.

components.name: Before/after slider
components.accessibilityNotes: Needs keyboard-operable handle; static before/after images work today.

components.name: FAQ accordion
components.accessibilityNotes: details/summary first; verify AT announcement quality.

components.name: Text-only editorial section
components.accessibilityNotes: .prose reading column.

components.name: Map/location section
components.accessibilityNotes: Third-party map embed; document integration pattern later.

components.name: Local trade/service business starter
components.accessibilityNotes: Skip link, landmark structure, labelled nav, keyboard-reachable form.
